summaries.theme_name: App Performance and Customer Support Issues
actionable_ideas: Optimize the app's update process to reduce frequency and improve stability
Enhance customer support by providing timely and personalized responses, and simplifying the support process
Conduct thorough testing to identify and fix technical glitches, especially during critical features like trading and IPO applications

verbatim_quotes.quote: just got update twice within a week.!!! fed up with this update notifications N Make difficult to trade with it..
verbatim_quotes.author: [REDACTED_USER]

verbatim_quotes.quote: The app is full of glitches lately.Unable to withdraw and add money during market crashes.
